Astroflux Wiki
Guides Quests Systems Stations Enemies Bosses Weapons Ships Items Artifacts Drops Media Map

Enemy Effects Guide

What The Client Cache Exposes

The random special-effect system is only partially exposed in the downloaded client data. The cache gives stable flags such as miniBoss, rareSettings, alwaysRare, and named rare families like rareAttacker or rareLegend. It does not publish a numeric table for the exact stat multipliers or a global loot-bonus formula, so this guide stays factual about what can be proven from the data.

Observed Coverage

Tracked hostiles43
Mini-boss flagged36
Random rare enabled21
Always rare11
Rare families5

Use each enemy page for the exact loot tables. This guide explains the special-effect flags and shows which enemies are wired for them.

Rare Effect Families

FamilyCache flagObservable stat signalObservable loot signalEligible enemiesMini-bossesAlways rareExamples
AttackerrareAttackerThe name suggests an offense-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact damage or refire multiplier.No global multiplier is exposed. Check the enemy page for direct and spawner-linked loot tables.961??? lvl ?? Divided, Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122, Nexar Elite Phaser lvl 120, Nexar Elite Shadow lvl 128
DefenderrareDefenderThe name suggests a survivability-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact HP, shield, armor, or resistance multiplier.No global multiplier is exposed. Check the enemy page for direct and spawner-linked loot tables.741??? lvl ?? Divided, Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122, Nexar Elite Phaser lvl 120, Nexar Elite Shadow lvl 128
LegendrareLegendA distinct rare family used by high-tier named enemies. The client cache exposes the flag but not the exact stat formula behind it.No global multiplier is exposed. Check the enemy page for direct and spawner-linked loot tables.1296??? lvl ?? Divided, Captain Xhargrefh lvl 120, Commander Zherghur lvl 88, Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis lvl 85
SpeederrareSpeederThe name suggests a movement-focused rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact speed or chase-range multiplier.No global multiplier is exposed. Check the enemy page for direct and spawner-linked loot tables.1073??? lvl ?? Divided, Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Elite Blade lvl 124, Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122
UniquerareUniqueA distinct rare family used by a smaller set of named enemies. The client cache does not expose a separate global loot rule for it.No global multiplier is exposed. Check the enemy page for direct and spawner-linked loot tables.966??? lvl ?? Divided, Admiral Zhersis lvl 130, Commodore Herivis lvl 122, Nexar Commander lvl 110

Tracked Enemy Records

Rows below include enemies that are mini-bosses, have rare-mode enabled, are always rare, or expose one of the named rare families.
